pbt_falsified.description: True if the harness crashed under ASan

pbt_confidence_boost.description: Confidence delta: +0.2 if falsified, -0.1 if held, 0 if skipped/failed

pbt_skipped.description: True if PBT was skipped (missing snippet or no valid suspicious points)

pbt_adjusted_confidence.description: True if localization_confidence was adjusted by PBT

pbt_exit_code.description: Exit code from the harness run
